name: aether-art-uniapp
description: 天异艺术 uni-app + Vue 多端 WebUI 正式工程

scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:style && npm run lint:format
scripts.lint:format: prettier --check "src/**/*.{ts,vue,scss}" "tests/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "*.{json,ts,js,html,cjs,mjs,md}" ".github/**/*.{yml,yaml}" "promptfoo/**/*.{md,yaml}" ".continue/checks/**/*.md" "semgrep/**/*.yml" "vale-styles/**/*.yml" "留档/{审查记录,计划记录,交付记录,即时思路记录}/*.md"
scripts.lint:docs: textlint "AGENTS.md" "README.md" "质量门禁工具接入说明.md" "源码交付白名单.md" "依赖与外链安全基线清单.md" "规则体系/**/*.md" "backend-handoff/**/*.md" "references/README.md" "留档/README.md" "留档/审查记录/*.md" "留档/计划记录/*.md" "留档/交付记录/*.md" "留档/即时思路记录/*.md" ".continue/**/*.md" ".github/README.md" "scripts/README.md" "promptfoo/**/*.md" "semgrep/**/*.md" "vale-styles/**/*.md" "提交清单/README.md" "垃圾桶/README.md"
scripts.format: prettier --write "src/**/*.{ts,vue,scss}" "tests/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "*.{json,ts,js,html,cjs,mjs,md}" ".github/**/*.{yml,yaml}" "promptfoo/**/*.{md,yaml}" ".continue/checks/**/*.md" "semgrep/**/*.yml" "vale-styles/**/*.yml" "留档/{审查记录,计划记录,交付记录,即时思路记录}/*.md"
scripts.quality:check: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run knip && npm run lint:docs
scripts.quality:full: npm run quality:check && npm run lint:semgrep && npm run lint:vale
